title: Gid`om #1440
definition:
Gidom = "a cutting down"

 1) the place where the Israelites ceased pursuing Benjamin, apparently
    situated between Gibeah and the cliffs of Rimmon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gidom = "a cutting down"

 1) the place where the Israelites ceased pursuing Benjamin, apparently
    situated between Gibeah and the cliffs of Rimmon

    NASB:  a place in Benjamin
